title: My Financial Autonomy Is Mine, Regardless of Source
subtitle: An affirmation for claiming financial independence as a fact that does not depend on who earns the money
excerpt: A brief affirmation for the stuck-on feeling that autonomy requires independent earning. The statement names financial self-determination as something that belongs to you within a partnership, not something you have to earn before you can have.

practice.whenToUse: Use on mornings when the pull to minimise, defer, or justify financial decisions is strong, as a reset to what is actually true.

content.text: A brief affirmation for the belief that autonomy requires earning your own income. The statement names financial self-determination as yours already — not contingent on who generated the money.
Say it three times, hand on heart. Notice if resistance comes. Say it anyway.
My financial autonomy is mine, regardless of source.
